verses.text: Hih pen Nineveh khua tawh kisai thu genna hi a, Elkosh khuami Nahum' maangmuhna a kiciamtehna lai ahi hi
Topa Pasian in amah a demte koihkhonglo a, amah a langpangte gim pia-in a galte thukkik hi
Topa lungduai mahmah a, a vang zong lian mahmah a, ahih hangin mimawhte khahkhong ngeilo hi. A paina peuhpeuhah huihpi nungin pingpei kipei a, ama paina hanga leivui leeng meiipi kai tawh kibang hi
Amah in tuipi a tai ciangin tuipi kangcip pah a, gunpite zong kangcipsak hi. Bashan gam keugawpin Karmel Mual kausan a, Lebanon Mual-a om pakpalhte a vul hi
Ama mai-ah mual liante ling a, mual neute a tuisuak hi. Ama mai-ah leitang kicim a, leitung leh a tunga om khempeuh a ling uh hi
Ama hehna kua in nangzo ding a, ama lunghamna kua in thuakzo ding ahi hiam? A hehna, meikuang bangin hong khahkhia a, ama mai-ah suangtumpite kitamzan hi
Topa hoih hi; lungkham hunin a mite huh a, amah a beel mite limtakin a kem hi
Tuikhang in a suksiat bangin a langte susiagawp a, a galte khempeuh khuamial sungah a nawtkhia hi
Bang hangin Topa sawm ngam na hi hiam? Amah in nang hong susia ding hi. Amah a su peuhpeuh a dingkikzo om ngeilo hi
Amaute, linglom bangin om uh a, zu leh sa tawh kidiahin a om laitakun ham bangin kihaltum ding hi
Nineveh khuapi aw, gitlohna tawh thu vaihawmin, Topa a sawm mite, nang' sungah om hilo ahi hiam

Topa in ama mite tungah hih bangin thu gen a, “Assiria mite thahatin a tam mahmah hangin, amaute kisusia-in maimang ding uh hi. No ka mite na hih uh leh, khatvei lai-in kong gimsak khit hangin tu-in note kong gimsakkik nawn kei ding hi
Note' tungah Assiria mite' aana neihna ka beisak ding a, note hong khihna sikkhaute ka sutat ding hi,” ci hi

Topa in Assiria mite tawh kisai-in hih bangin thu pia hi: “Note na cimang ding uh a, na pasian-te uh biakinn sunga om milimte ka susia ding hi. Note siahuai lua na hih manun na hankhuk ding uh a bawlbawl ka hi ta hi,” a ci hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Nineveh Khuapi A Kiatna ding Thu

verses.text: En un, mualtungah kamtaipa hong tai a, gualzawhna ding thupha hong gen ding ahi hi. Judah mite aw, pawi bawl un la, Pasian' tungah na ciam bangun gamta un. Bang hang hiam cih leh migilote kisusiacip khin a, na gam uh hong simkik nawnlo ding hi.
